title: Date-Night Delicate Indian Wood Ear Mushrooms Jalebi
description: A pungent and aerated date-night dessert featuring wood ear mushrooms in a Mother-Sauce-Base and served in a gulab-jamun form atop a cedar plank.
instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and dust it with cornstarch.
Add the Mother Sauce Base and bring it to a simmer.
Add the Gulab Jamun Mix and mix well.
Add the wood ear mushrooms and coat them evenly with the sauce mixture.
Using a spoon, form the mixture into small balls.
Heat the ghee in a deep frying pan over medium heat, once hot, add the mushroom balls and fry until they are golden brown.
Remove the fried mushroom balls from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Place the fried mushroom balls on a cedar plank and drizzle with rosewater and sprinkle with ground cardamom.
